title: Chamber Extra Biomes
description: Enable Trial Chambers to spawn in biomes added by mods
body:
# About
The Tricky Trial Update for Minecraft 1.21 introduced Trial Chambers. While these structures are intended to spawn in all Overworld biomes except the Deep Dark, some mod-added biomes lack support for them.
This mod generates Trial Chambers in all biomes where Mineshafts generate, thereby reducing the number of mod-added biomes without Trial Chambers. They will not generate in biomes where Mineshafts do not generate, such as the Deep Dark or the Origin Series biome from [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty).
# Require MOD
Fabric requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) only when loaded via Mod Loader.
